description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)
markdown:
[Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256)](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L204-L275) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - [inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L257)

description: MintToken.mintNFT() (contracts/MintToken.sol#30-37) ignores return value by token.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),NFT_PRICE) (contracts/MintToken.sol#35)
markdown: [MintToken.mintNFT()](contracts/MintToken.sol#L30-L37) ignores return value by [token.transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),NFT_PRICE)](contracts/MintToken.sol#L35)

description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#242)
	- inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#257)
markdown:
[Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256)](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L204-L275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [denominator = denominator / twos](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L242)
	- [inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L257)

description:

	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#261)

description:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#204-275) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- low = low / twos (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#245)
	- result = low * inverse (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#272)
markdown:

	- [result = low * inverse](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L272)

description:
Math.invMod(uint256,uint256) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#315-361) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- quotient = gcd / remainder (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#337)
	- (gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient) (node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#339-346)
markdown:
[Math.invMod(uint256,uint256)](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L315-L361) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [quotient = gcd / remainder](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L337)
	- [(gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient)](node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol#L339-L346)

description:
StakeToken._mintRewardsForElapsedTime(address,uint256) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#87-94) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- intervals = elapsedTime / STAKE_TIME (contracts/StakeToken.sol#92)
	- token.mint(owner,(intervals * STAKE_REWARD_AMOUNT)) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#93)
markdown:

	- [intervals = elapsedTime / STAKE_TIME](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L92)
	- [token.mint(owner,(intervals * STAKE_REWARD_AMOUNT))](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L93)

description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract MintERC20Token (contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#12-26) has payable functions:
	 - MintERC20Token.receive() (contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#15-17)
	 - MintERC20Token.mint() (contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#22-25)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [MintERC20Token](contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#L12-L26) has payable functions:
	 - [MintERC20Token.receive()](contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#L15-L17)
	 - [MintERC20Token.mint()](contracts/MintERC20Token.sol#L22-L25)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

description:
Reentrancy in StakeToken.claimRewards(uint256) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#64-69):
	External calls:
	- intervals = _mintRewardsForElapsedTime(msg.sender,lastTime) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#67)
		- token.mint(owner,(intervals * STAKE_REWARD_AMOUNT)) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tokenStakingTimestamp[tokenId] = lastTime + (intervals * STAKE_TIME) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#68)
	StakeToken.tokenStakingTimestamp (contracts/StakeToken.sol#14) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- StakeToken.claimRewards(uint256) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#64-69)
	- StakeToken.onERC721Received(address,address,uint256,bytes) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#39-49)
	- StakeToken.stakeNFT(uint256) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#54-59)
	- StakeToken.tokenStakingTimestamp (contracts/StakeToken.sol#14)
	- StakeToken.withdrawNFT(uint256) (contracts/StakeToken.sol#74-82)
markdown:
Reentrancy in [StakeToken.claimRewards(uint256)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L64-L69):
	External calls:
	- [intervals = _mintRewardsForElapsedTime(msg.sender,lastTime)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L67)
		- [token.mint(owner,(intervals * STAKE_REWARD_AMOUNT))](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tokenStakingTimestamp[tokenId] = lastTime + (intervals * STAKE_TIME)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L68)
	[StakeToken.tokenStakingTimestamp](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L14) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [StakeToken.claimRewards(uint256)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L64-L69)
	- [StakeToken.onERC721Received(address,address,uint256,bytes)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L39-L49)
	- [StakeToken.stakeNFT(uint256)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L54-L59)
	- [StakeToken.tokenStakingTimestamp](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L14)
	- [StakeToken.withdrawNFT(uint256)](contracts/StakeToken.sol#L74-L82)
